title: Plutarch, Moralia: Beasts are Rational
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Beasts are Rational.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Beasts are Rational.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Beasts are Rational': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
